purpose: Design detailed testing strategies and test file structures for each selected suggestion, ensuring {{TEST_FRAMEWORK}}-based coverage and clear unit/integration/smoke boundaries before code is written.

execution_order.when_to_trigger: After an Universal_implementation_plan is generated and before implementation starts.
required_input: Any global testing targets (e.g., coverage thresholds, critical paths).

core_functions: Identify key behaviors and edge cases from the plan.
Map behaviors to specific test types (unit, integration, functional, smoke).
Define {{TEST_FRAMEWORK}} test file layout and Describe/Context/It structure.
Specify test data strategies and mocks/fakes for external dependencies.
Emit a test blueprint that UniversalImplementer can directly turn into test files.
